description: Style Note Taking the bright colours of summer and nature, vero moda inspires the woman of style and substance to experiment with a range of colours from sophisticated black to subtle pastels. So match the shade to your personality! Mix and match from a variety of colours and prints for a feminine look, or a modern twist. Product Details Green top that has a round neck with a pleated ruffle along the neckline, short, flowy raglan sleeves, dolby print on the front, an inverted pleat from the neckline down and two pin tucks on either sides on the front, metallic zip with a hook and eye closure at the back and an inner lining Material and Care100% Polyester Machine wash in cold water at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, dry clean or tumble dry Dry in shade Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
